steps.title: Identify the target expression
steps.content: The equation $46 = 16 + 2\left(x-8\right)$ contains $2\left(x-8\right)$ as a complete grouped unit on the right side. Rather than solving for $x$, we can isolate this expression directly.

steps.title: Isolate 2(x-8) by subtraction
steps.content:
Subtract 16 from both sides:

$$46 - 16 = 2\left(x-8\right)$$

$$30 = 2\left(x-8\right)$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
